rulings.Case Title: HAROLD KOEPKE et al VS. FORD MOTOR COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion For Protective Order To Preclude Deposition Of Its 85-Year Old Former President And For Monetary Sanctions; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, April 9, 2014 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Volkswagen Group of America, Inc.'s amended motion for protective order to preclude deposition of its 85-year old former president and for monetary sanctions: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30a.m., not 9:00a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: HAROLD KOEPKE et al VS. FORD MOTOR COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order To Preclude Deposition Of Its 85-Year Old Former President And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, April 9, 2014 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Volkswagen Group of America, Inc.'s motion for protective order to preclude deposition of its 85-year old former president and for monetary sanctions is off calendar as superseded by defendant's amended notice of motion. = (503/TLJ)
